services.name: ✨ Spa Giveaway ✨ A Little Glow-Up on Us!
services.description: Enter to win FREE spa services! 3 winners — Underarm Laser, European Facial, or Brazilian & Underarm Wax. Follow, tag, like & share to enter. Deadline: April 1st, 2026.
services.fullDescription:
✨ SPA GIVEAWAY ✨
A little glow-up moment on us!

**Win One of These:**
• 🥇 1st Winner — Free Underarm Laser Session
• 🥈 2nd Winner — Free European Facial
• 🥉 3rd Winner — Free Brazilian & Underarm Wax

**How to Enter:**
1. Follow us on Instagram @laurasbeautytouch
2. Tag 3 friends in the comments — they must follow us too (yes, we'll check!)
3. Like the video
4. Share to your Instagram Story and tag us

**Giveaway Details:**
• Deadline: April 1st, 2026
• 3 winners will be selected
• All entry steps must be completed to qualify
• Tagged friends must also be following @laurasbeautytouch
• Winners will be announced on our Instagram

THANK YOU FOR BEING A PART OF OUR JOURNEY! GOOD LUCK! 🍀

services.name: Collagen Facial + FREE Eyebrow Wax or Hand Treatment
services.description: Indulge in a rejuvenating Collagen Facial paired with a complimentary Eyebrow Wax or Hand Treatment. Limited-time offer!
services.fullDescription:
✨ SPECIAL OFFER ✨

Treat yourself to our luxurious Collagen Facial and choose a FREE add-on:

• Free Eyebrow Wax — perfectly shaped brows to frame your glow
• Free Hand Treatment — soft, nourished hands to match your radiant skin

This bundle is the ultimate skin-rejuvenating experience at an incredible value.
benefits: Collagen Facial for deep skin rejuvenation
Choice of Free Eyebrow Wax or Hand Treatment

services.name: Oxygen Hydra Facial + FREE Underarm or Chin Laser
services.description: Experience our premium Oxygen Hydra Facial and get a complimentary Underarm or Chin Laser session. Glow inside and out!
services.fullDescription:
✨ SPECIAL OFFER ✨

Our most popular facial paired with a FREE laser session of your choice:

• Free Underarm Laser Session
• Free Chin Laser Session

The Oxygen Hydra Facial deeply hydrates, cleanses, and revitalizes your skin while you start your hair-free journey — all in one visit!
benefits: Oxygen Hydra Facial for deep hydration & glow
Choice of Free Underarm or Chin Laser Session
Premium combo at an unbeatable price

services.name: Permanent Makeup — Lips or Brows
services.description: Wake up flawless every day! Choose permanent makeup for your Lips or Brows. Long-lasting, natural-looking results.
services.fullDescription:
✨ PERMANENT MAKEUP ✨

Wake up beautiful every single day with our professional Permanent Makeup services:

• Permanent Lip Color — natural or bold, your choice
• Permanent Brow Design — full, defined, perfectly shaped brows

Our expert technicians create natural-looking, long-lasting results tailored to your unique features.
benefits: Choice of Permanent Lip Color or Permanent Brows

services.name: Aroma Express Facial + Body Scrub Spa & Spa Pedicure with Hand Treatment
services.description: A full-body pampering experience! Includes Aroma Express Facial, Aroma Body Scrub Spa with Shower, and Spa Pedicure with Hand Treatment.
services.fullDescription:
✨ SPA INDULGENCE SPECIAL ✨

The ultimate head-to-toe pampering package:

• Aroma Express Facial — refresh and revitalize your skin
• Aroma Body Scrub Spa with Shower — exfoliate and renew your entire body
• Spa Pedicure — luxurious foot care and polish
• Hand Treatment — soft, silky hands to complete your glow

The perfect escape for a full self-care day!
benefits: Aroma Body Scrub Spa with Shower
Hand Treatment for silky smooth hands

services.name: Lash Lift & Tint + FREE Eyebrow Wax
services.description: Get stunning lifted, tinted lashes plus a complimentary Eyebrow Wax. Look effortlessly polished every day!
services.fullDescription:
✨ SPECIAL OFFER ✨

Elevate your eye look with our Lash Lift & Tint bundle:

• Lash Lift — curled, lifted lashes that open up your eyes
• Lash Tint — rich, dark color for bold, mascara-free lashes
• FREE Eyebrow Wax — perfectly groomed brows to complete the look

Wake up with effortlessly beautiful eyes — no mascara needed!
benefits: Lash Lift for beautifully curled lashes
Lash Tint for bold, mascara-free color
